title: codereview-2: as_uint doc comment should reference the exact RFC section for integer option length limit
description: RFC 7252 Section 3.2 specifies the integer encoding. Update doc to link it precisely. Also, add test case in existing test.
close_reason: Doc comment updated with RFC 7252 §3.2 reference; test added in as_uint_truncates_long_values. All P4 codereview findings fixed in codec.rs
